proposal1.heroHeadline: 30acres is losing 200 hours annually on manual proposals. Here's the breakdown.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, proposals drag on for hours. With our system, generate them in just 47 seconds using your ecommerce expertise.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Here’s where 30acres is bleeding resources due to inefficiencies.

problems.title: Time Draining
problems.description: Each proposal can take up to 6 hours. That's 60 hours a month not spent enhancing client ecommerce solutions.

problems.title: Lost Deals
problems.description: Delayed proposals mean opportunities slip away. Every day late is a chance for competitors to swoop in.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Manually crafting proposals costs $150 per hour. That's $9,000 annually directly impacting your bottom line.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Manual processes lead to inconsistent presentation. Each inconsistency risks undermining your Shopify Plus and B Corp certification.

problems.title: Missed Personalization
problems.description: Without automation, personalization is limited. This leads to generic proposals that fail to highlight your unique multidisciplinary approach.

problems.title: Inefficient Tracking
problems.description: Tracking proposal engagement is cumbersome. This means potential insights into client interactions are lost, impacting closing rates.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system is the remedy to these ongoing losses.

solutions.title: Rapid Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, crafting proposals eats up hours. Now, create them in under a minute with full brand alignment.

solutions.title: Real-time Engagement Insights
solutions.description: Tracking client engagement is manual and slow. Our system provides instant insights, enhancing your follow-up strategy.

solutions.title: Consistent Brand Presentation
solutions.description: Manual branding leads to inconsistency. Our system ensures every proposal reflects your Shopify Plus and B Corp credentials.

solutions.title: Enhanced Personalization
solutions.description: Personalizing proposals is a manual task. Our AI tailors them automatically, highlighting your unique capabilities.

solutions.title: Cost Efficiency
solutions.description: Labor costs for proposals are high. Automate the process and save thousands annually, reallocating resources to growth.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for 30acres's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for 30acres around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for 30acres.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Digital Landscape with 30acres's Expertise
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Partner with 30acres to enhance your digital presence and convert more visitors into loyal customers.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently facing significant revenue losses due to underperforming digital assets.

problems.title: High Bounce Rate
problems.description: Every visitor that leaves your site without engagement is lost potential revenue. Current bounce rate is at 65%, which is 15% above industry average.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rates
problems.description: Conversion rates are at 1.5%, which translates to thousands of missed sales opportunities monthly.

problems.title: Outdated Website Design
problems.description: An outdated design can deter customers. Studies show that 38% of users stop engaging if content is unattractive.

problems.title: Poor Mobile Experience
problems.description: With 55% of traffic coming from mobile, a poor mobile experience is causing you to lose half of your potential customer base.

problems.title: Slow Load Times
problems.description: Users expect fast loading times. Current load time is 4 seconds, resulting in 40% visitor drop-off.

problems.title: Ineffective SEO Strategy
problems.description: Your current SEO strategy ranks below competitors, leading to 30% less visibility in search results.

proposal2.solutionIntro: 30acres offers targeted solutions to address these challenges and turn losses into gains.

solutions.title: Website Redesign
solutions.description: Revamp your website to improve user engagement and reduce bounce rates. A modern design attracts and retains customers.

solutions.title: Mobile Optimization
solutions.description: Enhance mobile usability to capture the mobile traffic you are currently losing. A seamless mobile experience boosts conversions.

solutions.title: Site Speed Enhancement
solutions.description: Optimize your website's load time to retain visitors. Faster loading times increase user satisfaction and sales.

solutions.title: SEO Strategy Overhaul
solutions.description: Improve your search engine ranking to increase visibility. A robust SEO strategy draws more traffic and potential sales.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: 30acres stands out with a unique approach that merges technical proficiency with a personal touch.

whyUsCards.description: We bring fresh ideas and a forward-thinking mindset to every project, ensuring top-notch results.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric Approach
whyUsCards.description: Our team prioritizes understanding your specific needs, fostering a collaborative environment.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Results
whyUsCards.description: With a history of successful projects, our track record speaks for itself in boosting client performance.

whyUsCards.title: Expert Team
whyUsCards.description: Our multidisciplinary team offers a wealth of experience and knowledge, tailored to your business.

serviceList: What we’re all about, all under one roof

lead.company_description:
30Acres is an integrated commerce agency with deep experience in ecommerce development and growth. We build bespoke online experiences for ambitious brands that care about their customers. We do this by immersing ourselves in your world, and by placing our feet in the shoes of your audience. It's this kind of empathy that drives us. It's how we're built. It's how we work. It's what makes us 30Acres. 

We believe doing business online is about so much more than marketing, technology and data. We place people at the very core of everything we do. Sure, we're an experienced bunch, but to truly succeed in the ever-evolving and fragmenting world of digital commerce, it takes a people-focused group of technicians, marketers and experience creators.

30Acres is a Shopify Plus Partner.

We're Good People.

We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer and we seriously value diversity in our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, colour, nationality, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, or disability status. We're carbon neutral and we're committed to giving back to our community and the environment.
